description: Delete one automation step or split branch through the NetHunt editor RPC wrapper. Requires confirmation.

automation_id.description: Automation identifier returned by `list_automations`, `get_automation`, or automation write previews.
automation_id.title: Automation Id

child_branch_num.description: Optional child branch number used when deleting split branches.
child_branch_num.title: Child Branch Num

confirm_write.description: Explicit confirmation flag required for mutating write operations.
confirm_write.title: Confirm Write

kind.description: Configured automation kind, for example `workflow`. Discover supported values with `list_automation_kinds`.
kind.title: Kind

payload.description: Optional NetHunt delete-step payload for advanced editor cases.
payload.title: Payload

step_num.description: Automation step number within the branch.
step_num.title: Step Num

name: delete_automation_step
